title: EQL-Bench v2: Epistemic Qualifier Loss Benchmark
description: 370 developer scenarios for measuring Epistemic Qualifier Loss (EQL) in LLM context compression. 8 domains (api, debug, design, compliance, multiagent, medical, legal, finance), 5 qualifier types, 90 ghost scenarios (implicit uncertainty). Used to measure EQLR (Epistemic Qualifier Loss Rate) — the fraction of compressions that silently drop uncertainty qualifiers.
